title: Nested interface reference not found due to inline optimization

features.name: nested interface member access through module port
features.description: Code should include a module with an interface port where nested interface members are accessed via dotted reference within a combinational always block

features.name: interface containing nested interface as member
features.description: Code should include an interface that contains another interface as a member variable, with the inner interface having additional signals

features.name: interface instance passed via module port connection
features.description: Code should include a parent module instantiating a child module and passing an interface instance through a named port connection where port name differs from instance name
